skill.name: error-debugging-multi-agent-review
skill.description: A sophisticated AI-powered code review system that coordinates multiple specialized agents to perform comprehensive code analysis through intelligent routing and synthesis.
skill.summary: Multi-agent code review orchestration tool with intelligent agent coordination and specialized domain expertise
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 27 static findings are false positives. The skill is a markdown documentation file describing a multi-agent code review orchestration tool. The scanner incorrectly identified markdown code fences as shell commands, and random text as cryptographic algorithms. No actual security risks were found. This is a safe, legitimate skill for coordinating AI-powered code reviews.

content.value_statement: Coordinate multiple AI agents to perform comprehensive code reviews with specialized expertise in security, architecture, performance, and quality domains.
actual_capabilities: Coordinate multiple specialized review agents in parallel or sequential workflows
Route code to appropriate agent types based on project characteristics
Synthesize insights from security, architecture, and performance reviewers
Aggregate and prioritize findings from multiple AI agents
Detect and resolve conflicting recommendations between agents
Validate review quality through cross-agent verification
limitations: Does not execute code or perform actual security scanning
Requires Claude or Codex to orchestrate the review process
Does not provide real-time execution of review agents
Quality depends on the underlying AI model capabilities

use_cases.title: Comprehensive Security Review
use_cases.description: Run coordinated security audits across a codebase by routing to security-specialized agents

use_cases.title: Architecture Validation
use_cases.description: Validate system design and architecture patterns through sequential architecture-focused reviews

use_cases.title: Performance Analysis
use_cases.description: Identify performance bottlenecks by coordinating performance analysis agents across code sections

prompt_templates.title: Basic Multi-Agent Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the error-debugging-multi-agent-review skill to review my codebase for quality issues. Target: $ARGUMENTS
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick code quality check across the project

prompt_templates.title: Security-Focused Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the error-debugging-multi-agent-review skill to perform a security audit. Route primarily to security-auditor agents. Target: $ARGUMENTS

prompt_templates.title: Hybrid Parallel Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the error-debugging-multi-agent-review skill to run parallel security and architecture reviews. Target: $ARGUMENTS
prompt_templates.scenario: Comprehensive review with multiple independent agents

prompt_templates.title: Sequential Workflow Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the error-debugging-multi-agent-review skill to run sequential design-review, implementation-review, and testing-review phases. Target: $ARGUMENTS
prompt_templates.scenario: Deep dive with dependent analysis phases

output_examples.input: Review my web application for security issues
output: Security findings: SQL injection risk in user input handling
Architecture recommendation: Implement circuit breaker pattern
Design pattern: Consider event-driven communication between services
Performance issue: N+1 query in user service
Optimization: Add caching layer for frequently accessed data
Memory concern: Large dataset loading without pagination

best_practices: Define clear agent roles and expertise areas before starting reviews
Use parallel execution for independent review types to save time
Implement conflict resolution to handle disagreements between agents
anti_patterns: Running too many agents in parallel which creates conflicting outputs
Skipping sequential phases when agent insights depend on previous results
Not aggregating and synthesizing results into a unified report

faq.question: What agents are available in this skill?
faq.answer: The skill supports Code Quality Reviewers, Security Auditors, Architecture Specialists, Performance Analysts, Compliance Validators, and Best Practices Experts.

faq.question: Can I run agents in parallel?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill supports hybrid execution with parallel agents for independent reviews and sequential processing for dependent insights.

faq.question: Does this skill execute code?
faq.answer: No, this is an orchestration skill that coordinates AI agents. It does not directly execute code or perform security scanning.

faq.question: How does conflict resolution work?
faq.answer: The skill detects contradictory recommendations, applies weighted scoring based on agent expertise, and escalates complex conflicts for human review.

faq.question: What input formats are supported?
faq.answer: The skill accepts file paths, Git repository references, and code snippets as input for review.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for production security reviews?
faq.answer: This skill coordinates AI-powered reviews but should complement, not replace, dedicated security tools and manual expert review for production systems.
